summary: Tested 3 P2 features for iWhistle: (1) Offline-first support with Firestore IndexedDB persistence, (2) Push notification scheduling Cloud Functions, (3) Mobile-responsive UI refinements. All features are working correctly.

feature_1_offline_support.enableIndexedDbPersistence: PASS - Called in firebase.ts line 44, imported from firebase/firestore
feature_1_offline_support.offline_indicator_text: PASS - Shows 'You're offline — changes will sync when reconnected' with amber background
feature_1_offline_support.online_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Back online — syncing changes' with green background for 3 seconds when reconnecting
feature_1_offline_support.indicator_wired_in_app: PASS - OfflineIndicator component is rendered in App.tsx line 52

feature_2_push_notifications.scheduleGameReminder_function: PASS - Cloud Function defined at line 158 in functions/index.js
feature_2_push_notifications.processGameReminders_function: PASS - Scheduled Cloud Function defined at line 216, runs every 15 minutes
feature_2_push_notifications.reminder_types: PASS - Creates 24h and 1h reminders in _game_reminders collection
feature_2_push_notifications.note: Cloud Functions are server-side only. The _game_reminders collection uses admin SDK to bypass Firestore rules (allow read, write: if false)

feature_3_mobile_ui.manager_tabs_icon_only_mobile: PASS - Tabs show icon-only on mobile (<640px), labels hidden with 'hidden sm:inline' class
feature_3_mobile_ui.manager_tabs_full_labels_desktop: PASS - Tabs show icons + labels on desktop (>=640px)
feature_3_mobile_ui.tabs_horizontal_scroll: PASS - TabsList has 'overflow-x-auto' and 'no-scrollbar' class for hidden scrollbar
feature_3_mobile_ui.ai_fab_position_mobile: PASS - FAB positioned at bottom-20 (80px from bottom) on mobile, above bottom nav
feature_3_mobile_ui.ai_fab_position_desktop: PASS - FAB positioned at bottom-6 (24px from bottom) on desktop
feature_3_mobile_ui.bottom_navigation: PASS - Shows 5 items: Home, Schedule, Games, Messages, Profile
feature_3_mobile_ui.messages_height_fix: PASS - Grid uses 'h-auto lg:h-[70vh]' for proper stacking on mobile
feature_3_mobile_ui.dashboard_stat_cards: PASS - Uses 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4' for responsive layout
feature_3_mobile_ui.login_page_mobile: PASS - Renders properly on mobile viewport (390x844)

test_cases_verified: Offline Support: OfflineIndicator component renders [data-testid='offline-indicator'] when offline - PASS
Offline Support: Firestore IndexedDB persistence enabled (enableIndexedDbPersistence called in firebase.ts) - PASS
Offline Support: Online indicator shows briefly when reconnecting - PASS
Push Notifications: Cloud Functions scheduleGameReminder defined in functions/index.js - PASS
Push Notifications: Cloud Functions processGameReminders defined (runs every 15 minutes) - PASS
Mobile UI: Manager page tabs show icon-only on mobile (<640px), full labels on desktop - PASS
Mobile UI: Manager tabs are horizontally scrollable with no visible scrollbar - PASS
Mobile UI: AI FAB button positioned above bottom navigation on mobile (bottom-20) - PASS
Mobile UI: Bottom navigation shows 5 items (Home, Schedule, Games, Messages, Profile) - PASS
Mobile UI: Messages page grid stacks vertically on mobile (h-auto instead of h-[70vh]) - PASS
Mobile UI: Dashboard stat cards show 1 column on mobile, 2 on sm, 4 on xl - PASS
Mobile UI: Login page renders properly on mobile viewport (390x844) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for offline/online indicators
IndexedDB persistence properly catches errors for multi-tab and unsupported browser scenarios
Cloud Functions use proper Firestore admin SDK to bypass security rules for _game_reminders collection
Mobile responsive classes properly implemented using Tailwind breakpoints (sm:, lg:, xl:)
no-scrollbar CSS utility properly defined in index.css for hiding horizontal scrollbar
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P2 features are fully functional: (1) Offline support with IndexedDB persistence and visual indicators, (2) Push notification Cloud Functions for game reminders (scheduleGameReminder triggers on game_assignments, processGameReminders runs every 15 min), (3) Mobile UI refinements including icon-only tabs, FAB positioning, and responsive layouts. The offline indicator can be tested by simulating offline mode with Playwright's context.set_offline(True).
